# Gandalf's Search

> [!note] 📖 Event · Cost: **X** · Lore

![[01067.png]]

---

**Action:** Look at the top X cards of any player's deck, add 1 of those cards to its owner's hand, and return the rest to the top of the deck in any order.

---
